chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3021 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 02.10.2025 None present for the petitioner. Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. Furthermore, it transpires that certain amendments have been made in the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act 2024, providing for Bail Applications to be entertained by the concerned Forum. As such, the instant Petition stands dismissed, leaving the Petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
